title: Daoist Canon: Yuhuang Xinyin Jing (Jade Emperor's Heart Seal) (Section 4)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Yuhuang Xinyin Jing (Jade Emperor's Heart Seal)
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Yuhuang Xinyin Jing (Jade Emperor's Heart Seal)

translation.text: From the Yuhuang Xinyin Jing (Jade Emperor's Heart Seal) of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
